sections.title: WH-questions + How much / What time / How often (Present Simple)
sections.rule: Where/Why/How/What + do + I/you/we/they + verb…? | Where/Why/How/What + does + he/she/it + verb…? (после does — глагол без -s).

examples.en: Where do you want to go now?
examples.ipa: /weə duː juː wɒnt tə ɡəʊ naʊ?/

examples.en: Why do you think so?
How do you prefer to learn English?
examples.ipa: /haʊ duː juː prɪˈfɜː tə lɜːn ˈɪŋɡlɪʃ?/

examples.en: When do you find time for it?
examples.ipa: /wen duː juː faɪnd taɪm fɔːr ɪt?/
examples.ru: Когда ты находишь время на это?

examples.en: When do you find time for all this?
examples.ipa: /wen duː juː faɪnd taɪm fɔːr ɔːl ðɪs?/
examples.ru: Когда ты находишь время на всё это?

examples.en: What do you know about it?
What do you know about all this?
examples.ipa: /wɒt duː juː nəʊ əˈbaʊt ɔːl ðɪs?/
examples.ru: Что ты знаешь обо всём этом?

examples.en: How does he prefer to learn English?
examples.ipa: /haʊ dʌz hiː prɪˈfɜː tə lɜːn ˈɪŋɡlɪʃ?/

examples.en: What does she know?
What does he want to do?
What do you want to do?
Where do you live?
Where do you study?
Where do you work?
When do you work?
Where does he work?
Where does she live?
Where does she study?
How much does it cost?
How much does this ticket cost?
How much does this dress cost?
How much does this ring cost?
How much does this bracelet cost?
How much does this bag cost?
How much does this service cost?
How much do you pay for it?
examples.ipa: /haʊ mʌtʃ duː juː peɪ fɔːr ɪt?/

examples.en: How much do you pay for this service?
examples.ipa: /haʊ mʌtʃ duː juː peɪ fɔːr ðɪs ˈsɜːvɪs?/
examples.ru: Сколько вы платите за эту услугу?

examples.en: How much do you pay for your education?
examples.ipa: /haʊ mʌtʃ duː juː peɪ fɔːr jɔː ˌedʒuˈkeɪʃn?/
examples.ru: Сколько ты платишь за своё образование?

examples.en: When do you have free time?
examples.ru: Когда у тебя есть свободное время?

examples.en: Why do you work so much?
What does he want?
What time do you usually get up?
examples.ipa: /wɒt taɪm duː juː ˈjuːʒuəli ɡet ʌp?/

examples.en: What time do you usually come to work?
examples.ipa: /wɒt taɪm duː juː ˈjuːʒuəli kʌm tə wɜːk?/
examples.ru: Во сколько ты обычно приходишь на работу?

examples.en: What time do you usually come home?
examples.ipa: /wɒt taɪm duː juː ˈjuːʒuəli kʌm həʊm?/
examples.ru: Во сколько ты обычно приходишь домой?

examples.en: What time do you usually go to bed?
examples.ipa: /wɒt taɪm duː juː ˈjuːʒuəli ɡəʊ tə bed?/
examples.ru: Во сколько ты обычно ложишься спать?

examples.en: Where do you want to work?
Where does he want to study?
How often do you do it?
How often do you learn English?
How often do you drive a car?
examples.ipa: /haʊ ˈɒfən duː juː draɪv ə kɑː?/

examples.en: How often do you go to the gym?
examples.ipa: /haʊ ˈɒfən duː juː ɡəʊ tə ðə dʒɪm?/
examples.ru: Как часто ты ходишь в спортзал?

examples.en: How often do you spend time with your family?
examples.ipa: /haʊ ˈɒfən duː juː spend taɪm wɪð jɔː ˈfæməli?/
examples.ru: Как часто ты проводишь время с семьёй?

examples.en: How often does he go to the gym?
examples.ipa: /haʊ ˈɒfən dʌz hiː ɡəʊ tə ðə dʒɪm?/
examples.ru: Как часто он ходит в спортзал?

examples.en: How often do you go to the park?
examples.ipa: /haʊ ˈɒfən duː juː ɡəʊ tə ðə pɑːk?/
examples.ru: Как часто ты ходишь в парк?

examples.en: What books do you read?
What movies do you watch?
What movies do you prefer to watch?
examples.ipa: /wɒt ˈmuːviz duː juː prɪˈfɜː tə wɒtʃ?/

examples.en: What videos do you usually watch?
What games do you play?
What games do you usually play?
examples.ru: В какие игры ты обычно играешь?
